overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action-adventure game featuring a samurai character traversing a dense forest path, ascending stone stairs, and arriving at the Cloud Forest Temple courtyard. The video showcases cinematic lighting with a moody blue-green color palette and traditional Japanese architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with large rock formations

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through dense forest terrain with sword at hip

entered.detail: tall trees with thick canopy creating dense forest environment
large boulders and rock outcrops alongside the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, densely forested area with limited sky visibility. The path is a dirt trail surrounded by tall trees and large rock formations, creating an enclosed and moody atmosphere with low lighting.

events.description: exits dense forest canopy into more open area with visible sky
location text 'Cloud Forest Temple' appears on screen indicating destination

agents.ego_description: character continues forward as forest opens up and temple structures become visible in the distance

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern marking the temple approach
curved wooden temple roof visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from dense forest to a more open area with partial sky visibility. A stone lantern appears on the right marking the approach to the temple, and the curved roof of the Cloud Forest Temple becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to temple entrance

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs toward temple entrance
lighting brightens slightly as character approaches temple clearing

agents.ego_description: character climbing weathered stone stairs flanked by trees and stone lanterns

entered.detail: ancient stone stairs leading upward to the temple
vertical prayer flags hanging between trees
traditional wooden temple gate structure at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long stone staircase toward the temple entrance. Prayer banners hang between trees overhead, and the temple buildings become more prominent on the right side as the climb progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with campfire and NPCs

events.description: encounters NPCs gathered around campfire in temple courtyard

agents.ego_description: character enters the temple courtyard and approaches NPCs near the campfire

notable_agents.action: standing near campfire with weapon ready

entered.detail: open dirt courtyard area at the temple entrance
burning campfire with orange flames providing light

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the open temple courtyard. A campfire burns on the left near wooden barricades, and several NPCs stand guard or gather around the fire. The temple buildings now surround the area, creating a settlement atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, moody forest into the open, inhabited courtyard of a mountain temple. It begins on a narrow dirt trail enclosed by towering trees and large rock formations under low, dim lighting. As the path opens and the sky becomes visible, the camera passes a stone lantern that signals the approach to the curved roofs of the Cloud Forest Temple in the distance. The scene then shifts to a steady ascent up a long stone staircase draped with overhead prayer banners, with the temple architecture growing more prominent on the right. Finally, the climb concludes as the camera enters a wide courtyard where a burning campfire and gathered guards create a lived-in settlement atmosphere surrounded by temple buildings.
